title: Convert a bulk DTO with indexed errors
scenario: Batch adapter input needs useful error context. Preserve the row index when one nested DTO cannot become a command.
instructions: Implement TryFrom<BulkRegisterDto> for BulkRegisterCommand. Reject empty batches and return InvalidUser { index, error } for the first invalid nested DTO.

hints.body: Keep the Converting DTOs into domain commands code active and implement TryFrom<BulkRegisterDto> for BulkRegisterCommand. Reject empty batches and return InvalidUser { index, error } for the first invalid nested DTO.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Convert a bulk DTO with indexed errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Convert a bulk DTO with indexed errors now extends the active Converting DTOs into domain commands code with dto nested conversions. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
